textPlain: Sounds lots of fun, but I would not be able to play.  Well I probably could but I have always been an extremely slow runner.Bicycling was different, but running, could never do :)

No disrespect to Ireland at all but this does not look like a real game.https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gyomkya9qG8It looks like something Michael Scott would have made up.  And how do you avoid getting run over?
